specFidelityNotes: Diff vs origin/main (f1859ac4) for #403 Phase 2.6. Workflows 7–9 (prevent_cancellation_8a, prevent_return_8b, prevent_refund_8c) each have five-stage prefilled/fillable review with workflow-keyed input defaults; Approve enabled via isReviewExecutableWorkflow; FBT prevent_return_8b_fbt stays scaffold-only (non-executable, empty review stages); mock execution keys and FBS timelines (10/15/10 steps) include waits, outcomes, and recovery copy per design flows; shared card Reject/Expand contract preserved; deriveLifecycleFromTimeline generalized for any terminal succeeded outcome. No intent creep contradicting specs.

convention_notes.note: MODULE.md documents workflows 7–9 approve registry, executable keys, and FBT intake boundary.
